Rules.InvariantScript:
/*Switch(
    true,
    varSetMod, 1 + (45 - 1) * Power(tmrIconSwitSelected.Value, 0.3),
    varSetMod, 1 + (1 - 1) * Power(tmrIconSwitSelected.Value, 0.3),
    1
)*/
If(
    varSetMod || cmpHeaderSimple.DarkModusInput,
    Parent.Width - Self.Width -1,//1 + (45 - 1) * (tmrPositionX.Value / tmrPositionX.Duration),
    1//45 - (45 - 1) * (tmrPositionX.Value / tmrPositionX.Duration)
)

/*Switch(
    true,
    varSetMod, 1 + (45 - 1) * Power(tmrIconSwitSelected.Value, 0.3),
    varSetMod, 1 + (1 - 1) * Power(tmrIconSwitSelected.Value, 0.3),
    1
)*/
If(
    varSetMod || cmpHeaderSimple.DarkModusInput,
    Parent.Width - Self.Width -1,//1 + (45 - 1) * (tmrPositionX.Value / tmrPositionX.Duration),
    1//45 - (45 - 1) * (tmrPositionX.Value / tmrPositionX.Duration)
)

If(
    varBtnAnimatedNewRecord,
    Parent.Width * Power(tmrBtnBgAnimated_6.Value / tmrBtnBgAnimated_6.Duration, 2.5) + Self.Height
    )
